title: Spears From Minecraft Live
description: I Coded The Diamond Spear from minecraft live
body:
**This datapack adds the "wood, gold, stone, iron, diamond, and netherite Spears" from minecraft live into your game.** 
[Click To See Gameplay](https://medal.tv/games/minecraft/clips/leKh6vo1r0KpBIlHw?invite=cr-MSw4dVAsMzEzMzExMzI2)

Requires a texturepack https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/diamond-spear-texturepack

![Jousting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15b598d09568342eb3034bd05c9dd289085ad177.jpeg)
